'''panuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feaster|feaster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feaster|feaster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| panuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pænikith|pænikith]] || [[word:pænikij|pænikij]] || [[word:pænikish|pænikish]] || [[word:pæniki|pæniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:panunukuth|panunukuth]] || [[word:panunukuj|panunukuj]] || [[word:panunukush|panunukush]] || [[word:panunuku|panunuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:panukuth|panukuth]] || [[word:panukuj|panukuj]] || [[word:panukush|panukush]] || [[word:panuku|panuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:panufkuth|panufkuth]] || [[word:panufkuj|panufkuj]] || [[word:panufkush|panufkush]] || [[word:panufkuf|panufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:panukuthu|panukuthu]] || [[word:panukuju|panukuju]] || [[word:panukushu|panukushu]] || [[word:panukuku|panukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:panukuth|panukuth]] || [[word:panukuj|panukuj]] || [[word:panukush|panukush]] || [[word:panuku|panuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:panukuthul|panukuthul]] || [[word:panukujul|panukujul]] || [[word:panukushul|panukushul]] || [[word:panukukul|panukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:panukuthuthu|panukuthuthu]] || [[word:panukujuju|panukujuju]] || [[word:panukushushu|panukushushu]] || [[word:panukuku|panukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:panukuthun|panukuthun]] || [[word:panukujun|panukujun]] || [[word:panukushun|panukushun]] || [[word:panukukun|panukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:panukuthuoro|panukuthuoro]] || [[word:panukujuoro|panukujuoro]] || [[word:panukushuoro|panukushuoro]] || [[word:panukukuoro|panukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
